LanguageData.ABY_ImplantInfo_BodyPartEfficiencyDesc: Efficiency of the replaced or added body part after installation.
LanguageData.ABY_ImplantInfo_CapacityDesc: Changes {0} by {1} when the implant is installed.
LanguageData.ABY_ImplantInfo_StatOffsetDesc: Changes {0} by {1} when the implant is installed.
LanguageData.ABY_ImplantInfo_StatFactorDesc: Multiplies {0} by {1} when the implant is installed.
LanguageData.ABY_ImplantInfo_BleedingRateDesc: Changes total bleeding rate by {0} while the implant is installed.
LanguageData.ABY_ImplantInfo_PainDesc: Changes felt pain by {0} while the implant is installed.
LanguageData.ABY_ImplantInfo_HungerRateDesc: Changes hunger rate by {0} while the implant is installed.
